stories.title: Tens of thousands evacuated from French tourist spot and near Madrid as wildfires spread
stories.summary: The fire has raged in the region for several days with officials now ordering the evacuation of the entire Cap Ferret peninsula.

stories.title: US hits dozens of countries with new wave of tariffs
stories.summary: Imposed citing forced labour concerns, the levies replace a temporary global duty brought in after the US Supreme Court struck down tariffs in February.

stories.title: US and Iran trade more strikes in Gulf as fears of escalation mount
stories.summary: It comes as Iran condemned the US plan to use frozen Iranian assets to pay for war damages.

stories.title: Indonesian babies were trafficked to Singapore. What happens to them now?
stories.summary: At least 12 babies have been trafficked from Indonesia to Singapore, but what will happen to them remains unclear.

stories.title: South Africa's president wins bid to temporarily halt impeachment inquiry over 'Farmgate'
stories.summary: Ramaphosa has faced scrutiny following the theft of large sums of cash from his private farm in 2020.

stories.title: Four Palestinians and two Israelis killed in West Bank shooting
stories.summary: Palestinians say villagers came under attack by settlers, while the Israeli military says a Palestinian stole a weapon and opened fire on hikers.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Trump's new global tariff draws rebukes from trade partners over forced labor justification
stories.summary: U.S. trading partners have rejected the forced labor rationale behind Trump's new global tariffs, while most signaled plans to keep negotiating.

stories.title: Kevin Warsh has homed in on three key phrases. How Fed watchers interpret them
stories.summary: In five public appearances, Warsh has used the phrase "family fight" 13 times, returning to "first principles" 11 times and "inflation is a choice" for the Fed six times.

stories.title: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
stories.summary: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

stories.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
stories.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Robot snakes searched for Venezuela earthquake survivors in collapsed buildings
stories.summary: US robotics researchers flew to Venezuela with snakebots after getting a call.

stories.title: Microsoft responds to LG monitors installing McAfee ads on Windows
stories.summary: App is installed through Windows Update when certain LG monitors connect to a PC.

stories.title: FDA reports new outbreak of explosive diarrhea with 72 cases identified
stories.summary: The FDA hasn't said where the cases are or how they're linked.

stories.title: Forgot your Google password? Now you can log in with a selfie.
stories.summary: Google's selfie videos can be used for account access, AI Avatars, and age verification.

stories.title: AI Kill Switch Act would let Trump admin order shutdown of rogue AI systems
stories.summary: Bill would let Homeland Security chief decide when an AI should be shut down.

stories.title: Tweety gets the third degree in final Coyote vs. Acme trailer
stories.summary: Also, the full trailer for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil features a likable everyman.

stories.title: A quantum roadmap would push Bitcoin much higher: Charles Edwards
stories.summary: A Bitcoin development roadmap that addresses quantum computing risks could see the price surge by “double digits” very quickly, according to Charles Edwards.

stories.title: Thailand SEC files complaint against Bitkub over alleged false disclosures
stories.summary: Thailand’s SEC filed a criminal complaint against Bitkub and two former directors over alleged false disclosures linked to a 2021 cyberattack involving $50 million in assets.

stories.title: Odos Protocol to shut down, gives users until July 30 to withdraw assets
stories.summary: Odos Protocol will shut down on July 30, giving users one week to withdraw assets. The team did not provide a reason for the decision.

stories.title: RWAs become Hyperliquid’s largest trading category
stories.summary: Tokenized RWA trading became Hyperliquid’s largest trading category for the first time, accounting for more than half of the decentralized exchange’s weekly trading volume.

stories.title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
stories.summary: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

stories.title: Samsung Wallet plans stablecoin support in digital payments expansion
stories.summary: Samsung Electronics plans to add stablecoin support to Samsung Wallet, expanding its mobile payments and rewards platform to include digital assets.

stories.title: APOE2 may protect the brain from Alzheimer’s and aging
stories.summary: The longevity-linked APOE2 gene appears to protect brain cells by reducing DNA damage and helping neurons recover from stress. The finding could open a new path toward treatments that mimic APOE2’s defenses in people at

stories.title: Ancient ape fossil in Egypt challenges the story of human origins
stories.summary: A newly identified fossil ape from northern Egypt is reshaping ideas about where the ancestors of modern apes first emerged. Analyses place it closer to living apes than any known East African species of the same age, po

stories.title: Sweden’s hidden rare earth deposits could help break China’s grip
stories.summary: Sweden could become an important source of rare earth elements needed for magnets and green technologies. Instead of extracting one target metal, researchers are cataloging everything contained in Swedish mineral deposit

stories.title: China’s Tianwen-1 captures interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS near Mars
stories.summary: China’s Tianwen-1 orbiter captured a faint but remarkable view of 3I/ATLAS as the interstellar comet raced past Mars. The images reveal its tail and glowing coma, offering scientists a glimpse of material born beyond our

stories.title: Orcas filmed smashing giant sunfish into thousands of pieces
stories.summary: Researchers in the Gulf of California have documented a dramatic orca behavior never described before. In two separate encounters, one orca gripped a dead sunfish by the fin while another charged into it at high speed, b

stories.title: A strange quantum effect dramatically boosts energy transfer
stories.summary: Researchers discovered a proton-assisted mechanism that greatly improves how triplet energy moves between quantum dots and nearby molecules. The proton briefly shifts position, helps coordinate electron movement, and the

stories.title: Scientists discover a compound that could supercharge aging muscle repair
stories.summary: A sulfur-based compound called LASSS appears to protect and supercharge a key protein involved in repairing damaged muscle. The discovery could eventually lead to new ways to slow muscle loss and preserve strength as peo

stories.title: A new antiviral could stop measles before an outbreak takes off
stories.summary: An experimental pill prevented a measles-like virus from spreading through the air or through close contact in ferrets. It worked when given shortly before or after exposure and also shortened illness and the period when

stories.title: APOE2 may protect the brain from Alzheimer’s and aging
stories.summary: The longevity-linked APOE2 gene appears to protect brain cells by reducing DNA damage and helping neurons recover from stress. The finding could open a new path toward treatments that mimic APOE2’s defenses in people at

stories.title: The billion-dollar problem keeping Ozempic, Wegovy, and Zepbound from patients
stories.summary: Ozempic, Wegovy, and similar drugs may deliver excellent health value, but covering them for millions of eligible patients could overwhelm insurance budgets. Researchers say better long-term support is needed and warn th

stories.title: Ozempic and Mounjaro linked to a surprising hair loss risk
stories.summary: A large study suggests that GLP-1 drugs including Ozempic and Mounjaro may slightly increase the risk of hair loss in people with type 2 diabetes. Compared with two other common classes of diabetes medications, GLP-1 use

stories.title: Popular childhood drinks may raise blood pressure decades later
stories.summary: A 25-year study found that frequent consumption of soda, sports drinks, and fruit juice beginning in childhood was linked to a higher risk of high blood pressure in adulthood. Swapping one daily drink for whole fruit, mi

stories.title: Chris Brown pleads guilty to affray over London nightclub attack
stories.summary: The US singer hit a man with a glass bottle in "a vicious and unprovoked attack", prosecutors said.

stories.title: Decoding Charli XCX's new album, Music, Fashion, Film
stories.summary: The star's new album strips away artifice to examine her life after the phenomenal success of Brat.

stories.title: Black Panther star Chadwick Boseman's family in legal dispute with his widow
stories.summary: The late actor's siblings claim she has mishandled distribution of the funds and "cannot be trusted".

stories.title: BBC's Fake or Fortune uncovers 'enormously important' painting worth £100,000
stories.summary: The painting by the 18th Century Scottish artist Katherine Read is thought to be worth more than £100,000.

stories.title: King and Queen emerge from Tardis to open Glasgow Commonwealth Games
stories.summary: The Royal couple drew gasps and cheers from the audience at the Hydro as they appeared on stage in Glasgow.

stories.title: Meta glasses banned by Comic-Con promoter after 'secret filming'
stories.summary: A number of guests said they would be reluctant to appear at conventions again after cases of recordings taking place without their knowledge.
